title: More Discs!
description: Adds many more discs into the game, while still feeling like vanilla.
body:
The full release is finally out! Adds dozens of discs, 8 disc rarities, and many ways to obtain discs. Detailed description below.

# **WARNING: ON THE MOUNTS OF MAYHEM UPDATE, TRADING WITH A WANDERING TRADER OR HAVING A DISC JOCKEY WILL CAUSE A CRASH. THIS IS A KNOW ISSUE AND WILL BE SOLVED IN UPDATE 1.2.1**

Do you want more discs to be in the game? Have exploring far and wide be more rewarding? Then this mod is for you! This mod adds dozens of new discs to the game, that can be found all around the world, in chests, entities, and even blocks. There are 8 rarities of discs; Common, Uncommon, Rare, Epic, Legendary, Villager Exclusive, Generic Wandering Trader Exclusive and Rare Wandering Trader Exclusive. Common and Uncommon discs can be crafted and can be dropped by creepers when shot by skeleton. Rare, Epic, and Legendary can be found in broken blocks, killed entities, and chests. The exclusives are can be traded from their respective traders. The mod also adds a new villager variant - The Disc Jockey. His job block is a jukebox, and he can trade flint, and discs up to epic rarity, including villager exclusive. Thanks for reading and enjoy the mod :)

VERSION 1.2 OUT SOON

vvv DISC GUIDES BELOW vvv
